purpose: Preserve commercial revision concepts only as bounded implementation guidance under the 22 locked concept mockup authority.
rules: This file does not authorize mockup generation.
This file does not authorize replacement visual creation.
This file does not authorize schematic mockup output.
This file does not authorize file-count-based mockup production.
This file may be used only as commercial and information-gateway implementation guidance against the locked 22 concept mockups.
Any future visual mockup work requires explicit user authorization and must be based on the locked concept mockup proof and retention stack.

bounded_revision_concepts_for_reference_.directive: Add a premium sponsor rail below the hero area for Founding Presenting Partner and category sponsor visibility.
Reposition the public site as DFW Matchday Information + Planning Hub while preserving DFW Matchday Concierge brand authority.
Use schedule, airport, stadium, Fan Festival, hotel-area, restaurant, watch-party, attraction, media/corporate, and team fan hub modules only as bounded implementation guidance.
Use public fan hub sponsor, route, restaurant, watch-party, affiliate, and activated-planning concepts only where consistent with locked concept direction and public monetization boundaries.
Use compact disclosure treatment for sponsored placement, affiliate/referral link, third-party provider, and official source cards.
Use partner and advertise content only as claim-safe commercial implementation guidance, not mockup generation authority.
Use coordinator-first public module concepts while keeping private corporate hubs ad-free.
Use mobile sponsor card stack concepts only as implementation guidance; mockup generation remains blocked without explicit user authorization.
Represent inventory status, sponsor status, dates, approvals, disclosures, claim review, and placement location only as internal-control implementation guidance.

blocked_mockup_treatments: official FIFA partner language without verification
official host city partner language without verification
team logo or tournament mark use without approval
ads inside Team Family private hub
ads inside Media / Corporate private hub
ads inside activated premium command hub
schematic boards treated as locked concept mockups
generated placeholders treated as user-review mockups
